title: Combustion Mayhem
body:
# **DISCONTINUED**
why's the description so edgy it's hilarious

**_this mod was made in MCreator, ~~so Bliph the Combustion Snail will have spawning issue~~, nothing is perfect._**

**Introduction below MAY CONTAIN SWEARS!!!!! Read it with your own caution!!!** 

hello there dear user, ever wanted to fight off infection mods with grindy armors and weapon? well i got you covered! **_Let's get to yapping!_**

this is **_Combustion Mayhem!_**

 

In here, we have....

 

**Bliph the Combustion Snail**!!

he serves any of those service such as:

**_-Tamable Pet_**

**_-Free Taxi biting monster mobs_**

**_-Goofy sound._**

**_~~-Doesn't involve in explosion~~_**
So you should take care of our little mascot by **KILLING MONSTERS**.

He is able to **_heal up upon killing a monsters_**! Pretty **_OP_** right?

 

BUT WAIT!

we have armor and a single weapon crafted by **_Bliph's compressed essence_**!

**Craft it by putting two raw combustion matter on side while a tnt in middle!**

after that go hayware on farming Bliph! he is actually **tough** for your well being!

Or.. you can trade with **_new scummy profession villager_**! they get profession by placing a TNT block! they sell you **Combustion Matter** with expensive price of emeralds! better get your fucking pickaxe ready.

now Combustion Armor!_(it doesn't explode because when effect is applied constantly it'll fucking launch you to the sky.)_ it is very **TOUGH** and **high knockback resistance!**_(become a mountain as a golem.)_

well... what about weapon? for good balance and motherly care for you, i made... a single **weapon**, BUTTT.. it'll **explode** if you hit a mob _(do not own a pet other than Bliph the Combustion Snail, farm or anything when you have it, DO NOT COMPLAIN TO ME ABOUT YOUR "ooh ooh mama my wolf, cat and villager farm died because of the explosion! wahh!" i do not give a fucking shit if you own the weapon:3.)_

well? what are you waiting for? go get your ass grinding and own a Bliph the Combustion Snail instead of your typical pet!

 

 

Reminder:

_-Use Optifine or Entity Texture Feature for full EMISSIVE armor experience!_

_-the weapon and the armors are balanced around to fight off infections mods if you feel skill issue enough. (no offense to infection mods)_

 

goodbye!

found out reason for taking damage in creative mode, will not fixing it🤑🤑🤑🙏🙏🔥🔥🔥‼‼⁉

Planned stuff:

-more explosive to match more of this mod feels

-reasonable and good scummy combustion villager trades

-lore(never)
